title: The Car Engine
description: A car datapack, Multiplayer friendly, Customizable.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75284ca5c5a1fe0e06774a8f7bab74604d6b392d_0.webp) [![wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/wiki-TCE-blue?logo=github)](https://github.com/MCTCRS/thecarengine/wiki) [![wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/issues-TCE-red?logo=github)](https://github.com/MCTCRS/thecarengine/issues) ### Welcome to TCE (or The Car Engine, orignally (un)known as The's Car Engine) This datapack adds _customizable_ vehicles to vanilla Minecraft. It is designed to be _lightweight_ and multiplayer-friendly. ### Getting started Use the command ```/function tce:``` to get a shortcut book to the features of the datapack.
For more infomation about all the features visit the [Wiki](https://github.com/MCTCRS/thecarengine/wiki) page. ![](https://i.imgur.com/qGd4RFn.gif)
